parameter.value:
<script>
(function () {
  var HEADING = '\u5E83\u544A\u3092\u30AF\u30EA\u30C3\u30AF\u3057\u305F\u65B9\u9650\u5B9A\u30AD\u30E3\u30F3\u30DA\u30FC\u30F3';
  var MESSAGE = 'HP\u4E0A\u306E\u30CD\u30BA\u30DF\u3092\u898B\u3064\u3051\u305F\u3089\u30EA\u30B9\u30C6\u30A3\u30F3\u30B0\u5E83\u544A\u8A2D\u5B9A\u304C\u7121\u6599\u3002\u7B54\u3048\u306FGoogle\u30D5\u30A9\u30FC\u30E0\u3078';
  var ACCENT = '#d97706';
  var SOFT_BG = '#fff7ed';

  var showModal = function () {
    if (!document.body || document.getElementById('lp-popup-overlay-v5')) {
      return;
    }

    var overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.id = 'lp-popup-overlay-v5';
    overlay.style.cssText = [
      'position:fixed',
      'top:0',
      'right:0',
      'bottom:0',
      'left:0',
      'z-index:2147483000',
      'background:rgba(0,0,0,0.45)',
      'display:flex',
      'align-items:center',
      'justify-content:center',
      'padding:20px'
    ].join(';');

    var modal = document.createElement('div');
    modal.setAttribute('role', 'dialog');
    modal.setAttribute('aria-modal', 'true');
    modal.style.cssText = [
      'width:92vw',
      'max-width:460px',
      'background:#ffffff',
      'border-radius:14px',
      'border:2px solid ' + ACCENT,
      'box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.28)',
      'overflow:hidden'
    ].join(';');

    var head = document.createElement('div');
    head.style.cssText = [
      'padding:14px 18px',
      'font-weight:700',
      'font-size:16px',
      'background:' + SOFT_BG,
      'color:' + ACCENT
    ].join(';');
    head.appendChild(document.createTextNode(HEADING));

    var body = document.createElement('div');
    body.style.cssText = 'padding:18px 18px 10px;color:#111827;line-height:1.75;font-size:15px;';
    body.appendChild(document.createTextNode(MESSAGE));

    var footer = document.createElement('div');
    footer.style.cssText = 'display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;padding:0 18px 18px;';

    var closeBtn = document.createElement('button');
    closeBtn.type = 'button';
    closeBtn.appendChild(document.createTextNode('\u9589\u3058\u308B'));
    closeBtn.style.cssText = [
      'border:none',
      'border-radius:8px',
      'padding:9px 14px',
      'font-size:14px',
      'font-weight:700',
      'cursor:pointer',
      'background:' + ACCENT,
      'color:#ffffff'
    ].join(';');

    var closeModal = function () {
      if (overlay && overlay.parentNode) {
        overlay.parentNode.removeChild(overlay);
      }
    };

    closeBtn.addEventListener('click', closeModal);
    overlay.addEventListener('click', function (event) {
      if (event.target === overlay) {
        closeModal();
      }
    });

    footer.appendChild(closeBtn);
    modal.appendChild(head);
    modal.appendChild(body);
    modal.appendChild(footer);
    overlay.appendChild(modal);
    document.body.appendChild(overlay);
  };

  try {
    if (window.__lpPopupShownV5) {
      return;
    }

    var run = function () {
      if (window.__lpPopupShownV5) {
        return;
      }
      showModal();
      window.__lpPopupShownV5 = true;
    };

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', run);
    } else {
      run();
    }
  } catch (e) {
    // Fail safe
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function () {

  var MESSAGE = 'ai \u30A8\u30FC\u30B8\u30A7\u30F3\u30C8\u306E\u4F5C\u6210\u3082\u53D7\u3051\u305F\u307E\u3063\u3066\u304A\u308A\u307E\u3059';
  var ACCENT = '#1d4ed8';
  var SOFT_BG = '#eff6ff';

  };

  try {
    if (window.__lpPopupShownV5) {
      return;
    }

    var run = function () {
      if (window.__lpPopupShownV5) {

      }
      showModal();
      window.__lpPopupShownV5 = true;
    };

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', run);
    } else {
      run();
    }
  } catch (e) {
    // Fail safe
  }
})();
</script>
